dict.string: Copyright © 2026 Matthew Merino. All rights reserved.
macbot uses screen capture to analyze what's on your screen when you use the overlay feature. All processing happens locally.
macbot uses the microphone for voice input. Audio is processed on-device and never sent to any server.
macbot can use the camera for visual input. All processing happens locally on this Mac.
macbot uses accessibility to read window titles for context awareness and to control apps with the ghost cursor feature.
macbot can read your calendar to help with scheduling. Calendar data stays on this device.
macbot can access contacts for communication features. Contact data stays on this device.
